# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Distribute Application

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
      - 'release/*'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_configuration:
        description: 'Build configuration (Debug/Release)'
        required: true
        default: 'Release'
        type: choice
        options:
          - Debug
          - Release
      include_debug_symbols:
        description: 'Include debug symbols in artifacts'
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean

env:
  BUILD_CONFIG: ${{ github.event.inputs.build_configuration || 'Release' }}
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: 30

jobs:
  build-linux:
    name: Build Linux Binaries
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up build environment
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y build-essential cmake pkg-config

      - name: Cache dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache
            build/_deps
          key: linux-deps-${{ hashFiles('**/CMakeLists.txt', '**/requirements.txt', '**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            linux-deps-

      - name: Generate build metadata
        id: metadata
        run: |
          echo "build_timestamp=$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "short_sha=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "version=$(git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo '0.0.0-dev')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "branch_name=${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          mkdir -p build/output/bin
          mkdir -p build/output/lib
          mkdir -p build/output/config
          mkdir -p build/output/scripts

          # Build the application (adjust commands for your build system)
          if [ -f "CMakeLists.txt" ]; then
            cd build
            cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}
            cmake --build . --config ${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }} -j$(nproc)
            cd ..
          elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
            make BUILD_TYPE=${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }} -j$(nproc)
          elif [ -f "build.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x build.sh
            ./build.sh ${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}
          fi

      - name: Collect compiled binaries
        run: |
          # Copy compiled binaries to output directory
          find build -type f -executable -not -path "*/CMakeFiles/*" -not -path "*/_deps/*" \
            -exec cp {} build/output/bin/ \; 2>/dev/null || true
          find build -name "*.so" -o -name "*.a" \
            -exec cp {} build/output/lib/ \; 2>/dev/null || true

          # If no build artifacts found, create a placeholder to show the workflow works
          if [ -z "$(ls -A build/output/bin/ 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
            echo "No compiled binaries found - ensure your build system outputs to expected paths" > build/output/bin/BUILD_NOTE.txt
          fi

      - name: Collect configuration files
        run: |
          # Copy all configuration files
          CONFIG_PATTERNS=("*.yml" "*.yaml" "*.json" "*.toml" "*.ini" "*.cfg" "*.conf" "*.env.example" "*.properties")
          CONFIG_DIRS=("config" "configs" "conf" "etc" "settings")

          for dir in "${CONFIG_DIRS[@]}"; do
            if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
              cp -r "$dir"/* build/output/config/ 2>/dev/null || true
            fi
          done

          # Also pick up root-level config files
          for pattern in "${CONFIG_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
            find . -maxdepth 2 -name "$pattern" \
              -not -path "./build/*" \
              -not -path "./.github/*" \
              -not -path "./node_modules/*" \
              -exec cp {} build/output/config/ \; 2>/dev/null || true
          done

      - name: Collect deployment scripts
        run: |
          # Copy deployment scripts
          SCRIPT_DIRS=("scripts" "deploy" "deployment" "ops" "infra")

          for dir in "${SCRIPT_DIRS[@]}"; do
            if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
              cp -r "$dir"/* build/output/scripts/ 2>/dev/null || true
            fi
          done

          # Copy root-level deployment scripts
          for script in deploy.sh rollback.sh start.sh stop.sh restart.sh install.sh setup.sh; do
            if [ -f "$script" ]; then
              cp "$script" build/output/scripts/
            fi
          done

          # Copy Docker-related files if present
          for file in Dockerfile docker-compose.yml docker-compose.yaml; do
            if [ -f "$file" ]; then
              cp "$file" build/output/scripts/
            fi
          done

          # Copy Kubernetes manifests if present
          if [ -d "k8s" ]; then
            cp -r k8s build/output/scripts/
          fi

          # Ensure scripts are executable
          find build/output/scripts -type f \( -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.bash" \) -exec chmod +x {} \;

      - name: Collect debug symbols
        if: ${{ github.event.inputs.include_debug_symbols == 'true' }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p build/output/debug-symbols
          find build -name "*.debug" -o -name "*.dSYM" -o -name "*.pdb" \
            -exec cp -r {} build/output/debug-symbols/ \; 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Generate build manifest
        run: |
          cat > build/output/BUILD_MANIFEST.json << EOF
          {
            "application": "${{ github.event.repository.name }}",
            "version": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.version }}",
            "build_configuration": "${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}",
            "build_timestamp": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.build_timestamp }}",
            "git_commit": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "git_short_sha": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}",
            "git_branch": "${{ steps.metadata.outputs.branch_name }}",
            "git_ref": "${{ github.ref }}",
            "runner_os": "Linux",
            "runner_arch": "${{ runner.arch }}",
            "triggered_by": "${{ github.actor }}",
            "workflow_run_id": "${{ github.run_id }}",
            "workflow_run_number": "${{ github.run_number }}",
            "repository": "${{ github.repository }}",
            "artifacts": {
              "binaries": "$(ls build/output/bin/ 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', ' | sed 's/,$//')",
              "libraries": "$(ls build/output/lib/ 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', ' | sed 's/,$//')",
              "config_files": "$(ls build/output/config/ 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', ' | sed 's/,$//')",
              "scripts": "$(ls build/output/scripts/ 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', ' | sed 's/,$//')"
            }
          }
          EOF

      - name: Generate checksums
        run: |
          cd build/output
          find . -type f -not -name "CHECKSUMS.sha256" | sort | xargs sha256sum > CHECKSUMS.sha256

      - name: Upload compiled binaries
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: binaries-linux-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: build/output/bin/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Upload shared libraries
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: libraries-linux-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: build/output/lib/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Upload configuration files
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: config-files-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: build/output/config/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: build/output/scripts/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Upload debug symbols
        if: ${{ github.event.inputs.include_debug_symbols == 'true' }}
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: debug-symbols-linux-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: build/output/debug-symbols/
          retention-days: 14
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Upload complete distribution package
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: full-distribution-linux-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.version }}-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: |
            build/output/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}

      - name: Upload build manifest and checksums
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-metadata-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: |
            build/output/BUILD_MANIFEST.json
            build/output/CHECKSUMS.sha256
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}

  build-windows:
    name: Build Windows Binaries
    runs-on: windows-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Generate build metadata
        id: metadata
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "short_sha=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "version=$(git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo '0.0.0-dev')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Build application
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path build/output/bin
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path build/output/lib
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path build/output/config
          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path build/output/scripts

          # Build the application (adjust for your build system)
          if (Test-Path "CMakeLists.txt") {
            cmake -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}
            cmake --build build --config ${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}
          } elseif (Test-Path "*.sln") {
            $solution = Get-ChildItem -Filter "*.sln" | Select-Object -First 1
            msbuild $solution.FullName /p:Configuration=${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }} /p:Platform=x64
          }

      - name: Collect Windows artifacts
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          # Collect executables and DLLs
          Get-ChildItem -Path build -Recurse -Include *.exe,*.dll -Exclude *CMake* |
            Copy-Item -Destination build/output/bin/ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

          Get-ChildItem -Path build -Recurse -Include *.lib |
            Copy-Item -Destination build/output/lib/ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

          # Collect config files
          $configDirs = @("config", "configs", "conf", "settings")
          foreach ($dir in $configDirs) {
            if (Test-Path $dir) {
              Copy-Item -Path "$dir/*" -Destination build/output/config/ -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
            }
          }

          # Collect deployment scripts
          $scriptDirs = @("scripts", "deploy", "deployment")
          foreach ($dir in $scriptDirs) {
            if (Test-Path $dir) {
              Copy-Item -Path "$dir/*" -Destination build/output/scripts/ -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
            }
          }
          Get-ChildItem -Path . -MaxDepth 1 -Include *.ps1,*.bat,*.cmd |
            Copy-Item -Destination build/output/scripts/ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

      - name: Upload Windows distribution package
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: full-distribution-windows-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.version }}-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: build/output/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}

  build-macos:
    name: Build macOS Binaries
    runs-on: macos-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Generate build metadata
        id: metadata
        run: |
          echo "short_sha=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "version=$(git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo '0.0.0-dev')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          mkdir -p build/output/{bin,lib,config,scripts}

          if [ -f "CMakeLists.txt" ]; then
            cd build
            cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}
            cmake --build . --config ${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }} -j$(sysctl -n hw.ncpu)
            cd ..
          elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
            make BUILD_TYPE=${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }} -j$(sysctl -n hw.ncpu)
          fi

      - name: Collect macOS artifacts
        run: |
          find build -type f -perm +111 -not -path "*/CMakeFiles/*" -not -path "*/_deps/*" \
            -exec cp {} build/output/bin/ \; 2>/dev/null || true
          find build -name "*.dylib" -o -name "*.a" \
            -exec cp {} build/output/lib/ \; 2>/dev/null || true

          for dir in config configs conf settings; do
            [ -d "$dir" ] && cp -r "$dir"/* build/output/config/ 2>/dev/null || true
          done

          for dir in scripts deploy deployment; do
            [ -d "$dir" ] && cp -r "$dir"/* build/output/scripts/ 2>/dev/null || true
          done

      - name: Upload macOS distribution package
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: full-distribution-macos-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.version }}-${{ steps.metadata.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: build/output/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}

  create-summary:
    name: Create Distribution Summary
    needs: [build-linux, build-windows, build-macos]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Download all artifacts metadata
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          pattern: build-metadata-*
          path: metadata/
          merge-multiple: true

      - name: Generate distribution summary
        run: |
          cat >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY << 'EOF'
          ## 📦 Build Distribution Summary

          ### Build Information
          | Property | Value |
          |----------|-------|
          | **Repository** | `${{ github.repository }}` |
          | **Branch** | `${{ github.ref_name }}` |
          | **Commit** | `${{ github.sha }}` |
          | **Configuration** | `${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}` |
          | **Triggered by** | `${{ github.actor }}` |
          | **Run ID** | `${{ github.run_id }}` |

          ### Platform Build Status
          | Platform | Status |
          |----------|--------|
          | 🐧 Linux | ${{ needs.build-linux.result == 'success' && '✅ Success' || '❌ Failed' }} |
          | 🪟 Windows | ${{ needs.build-windows.result == 'success' && '✅ Success' || '❌ Failed' }} |
          | 🍎 macOS | ${{ needs.build-macos.result == 'success' && '✅ Success' || '❌ Failed' }} |

          ### 📥 Download Artifacts
          Artifacts are available for download from the **Actions** tab of this workflow run.

          **Available artifact packages:**
          - **Full Distribution Package** - Complete build with binaries, configs, and scripts (per platform)
          - **Compiled Binaries** - Application executables only
          - **Configuration Files** - All configuration templates and files
          - **Deployment Scripts** - Scripts for deployment and operations
          - **Build Metadata** - Build manifest and checksums

          > **Note:** Artifacts are retained for **${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }} days**. Download them before they expire.
          > 
          > **Direct link:** [Download artifacts from this run](${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }})
          EOF

      - name: Display build manifest
        if: hashFiles('metadata/BUILD_MANIFEST.json') != ''
        run: |
          echo "### Build Manifest" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo '```json' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          cat metadata/BUILD_MANIFEST.json >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

  notify-team:
    name: Notify Team of Available Build
    needs: [create-summary, build-linux, build-windows, build-macos]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release/')
    steps:
      - name: Post build availability notification
        run: |
          echo "🔔 Build artifacts are ready for distribution"
          echo "Download URL: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
          echo ""
          echo "Build details:"
          echo "  Repository: ${{ github.repository }}"
          echo "  Branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}"
          echo "  Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "  Configuration: ${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}"
          echo "  Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
